MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-22-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER SANKAT MOCHAN HANUMAN LLC DBA DAHLIA HOTEL NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO APPOINT UMPIRE IS GRANTED. UNLESS THE PARTIES MUTUALLY AGREE ON AN UMPIRE, THE COURT APPOINTS HON. CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD (RET.). MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. IF PARTIES AGREE ON AN UMPIRE UPON THE EXPIRATION OF THE 5 DAYS TO OBJECT TO THE FORM OF ORDER, THE NAME SHALL BE INCLUDED IN THE ORDER. IF PARTIES, DO NOT AGREE THE NAME SHALL BE LEFT BLANK. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Appoint Umpire
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER SANKAT MOCHAN HANUMAN LLC DBA DAHLIA HOTEL NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO APPOINT UMPIRE is GRANTED. Unless the parties mutually agree on an umpire, the Court appoints Hon. Charlotte Walter Woolard (Ret.). Moving party to prepare an order in accordance with CRC 3.1312. If parties agree on an umpire upon the expiration of the 5 days to object to the form of order, the name shall be included in the order. If parties, do not agree the name shall be left blank.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
